brand.subtitle: 중고 월 프린터 거래
footer.text: 중고 월 프린터 목록과 구매자 소개. 거래는 구매자와 판매자가 직접 진행합니다.
home.hero.title: 중고 월 프린터를 명확하게 확인하세요.
home.hero.text: 중고 월 프린터, 비공개 판매자 소개, 구매자 주도 검증에 집중한 플랫폼입니다.
home.trust.label: Platform approach
home.trust1.title: 검토된 제출
home.trust1.text: 판매자가 제출한 장비는 공개 전에 관리자 검토를 거칩니다.
home.trust2.title: 판매자 정보 비공개
home.trust2.text: 직접 연락처는 검토된 소개 절차를 통해서만 공유됩니다.
home.trust3.title: 구매자 주도 검증
home.trust3.text: 검사, 결제 조건, 운송, 통관, 최종 실사는 구매자의 책임입니다.
home.noResultsText: Try a broader search, clear the filters, or submit a buying request so admin can match suitable machines manually.
about.h1: 중고 월 프린터 장비를 위한 전문 교환 플랫폼.
about.text: Wall Printer Exchange helps sellers present used wall printers clearly and helps buyers discover machines worth reviewing. We are an introduction platform, not a marketplace that holds funds or guarantees machine condition.
about.card1.text: We collect seller submissions, organize machine information, publish approved machines, and help serious buyers request seller contact or submit buying requirements.
about.card2.text: We do not inspect machines, provide escrow, process payments, arrange shipping, handle customs, provide installation, or issue warranties for used machines.
about.card3.text: The site is built for commercial buyers, dealers, print-service businesses, and sellers who need a clearer channel for used wall printer opportunities.
about.note.text: We make machine discovery and introductions easier. Buyers and sellers still verify every technical, financial, legal, and logistics detail directly before any deal.
buyer.h1: 더 낮은 위험으로 중고 월 프린터를 구매하는 방법.
buyer.text: Used wall printers can be good opportunities, but condition, printhead health, accessories, software, and logistics must be verified carefully before payment.
buyer.step1.text: Review price, location, year, brand, model, printhead type, working status, images, and any known defects. Shortlist only machines with enough information to justify a conversation.
buyer.step2.text: Use the contact request form on the machine detail page. After admin review, contact details may be released so you can speak directly with the seller.
buyer.step3.text: Ask for live video, recent photos, nozzle tests, serial number, proof of ownership, accessory list, software status, and a written agreement before sending money.
buyer.step4.text: Confirm packaging, pickup address, dimensions, weight, export documents, import duties, taxes, insurance, and responsibility for shipping damage.
buyer.cta.text: Use the verification checklist before making a purchase decision.
seller.h1: 중고 월 프린터를 전문적으로 소개하는 방법.
seller.text: A complete machine page helps serious buyers understand the machine faster and reduces repetitive questions during the introduction process.
seller.step1.text: Include brand, model, production year, purchase year, printhead type, printhead count, working status, known defects, included accessories, and asking price.
seller.step2.text: Show the full machine, rails, printheads, ink system, control box, software screen, nameplate, accessories, and recent print samples. Clear photos reduce buyer uncertainty.
seller.step3.text: Describe what works, what does not work, maintenance history, storage condition, repairs, and anything the buyer should know before arranging inspection or shipping.
seller.step4.text: Your direct contact details and exact address are not publicly displayed. They may be shared with qualified buyers after admin review.
seller.cta.text: Use the floating Sell button on the homepage and complete the seller declaration before submitting.
check.text: Wall Printer Exchange is not an inspection, escrow, payment, shipping, or warranty provider. Use this checklist before any purchase decision.
check.identity1: Confirm seller name, company, email, phone, WhatsApp, and business details where applicable.
check.identity2: Ask for invoice, purchase record, serial number, nameplate, or other ownership documents.
check.identity3: Confirm the seller is authorized to sell and that there is no undisclosed lien or ownership dispute.
check.condition1: Request recent photos of the full machine, printheads, rails, ink system, control box, software screen, and accessories.
check.condition2: Arrange a live video demonstration showing startup, movement, nozzle test, and real printing if possible.
check.condition3: Check printhead model, number of heads, nozzle condition, ink flow, replacement history, and print quality evidence.
check.package1: Confirm rails, extension poles, computer, software, dongle, ink, spare parts, tools, manuals, and packaging materials.
check.package2: Ask about production year, purchase year, usage frequency, maintenance, repairs, known defects, and storage condition.
check.package3: Clarify whether the machine is currently working, partly working, or requires repair.
check.terms1: Clarify packaging, pickup address, dimensions, weight, export documents, customs, duties, taxes, insurance, and shipping damage responsibility.
check.terms2: Use a written agreement covering condition, included items, price, payment terms, delivery terms, inspection rights, refund terms, and after-sale responsibilities.
check.terms3: Avoid full payment before verifying seller identity, machine condition, and transaction terms.
check.note.text: Wall Printer Exchange does not hold buyer funds and does not guarantee machine condition, ownership, print quality, shipping outcome, customs clearance, installation, training, or after-sales support.
modal.seller.title: List your used wall printer
modal.seller.text: Confirm the terms, then submit the machine for admin review.
modal.buyer.title: Describe the machine you need
modal.buyer.text: Submit your target machine. Admin can match up to five suitable machines.
success.machine.text: Your used wall printer is now pending admin review. It will not appear publicly until approved.
success.contact.text: Admin will review the request before seller contact information is released.
success.buying.text: Your request has been submitted for admin review and matching.
success.step2: Qualified parties may be introduced by email.
success.step3: Buyers verify machine condition directly with sellers.
error.text: The request could not be completed. Please review the information and try again.
404.text: The page, request, or machine may have been moved, archived, or removed.
seo.home.title: 중고 월 프린터 판매
seo.home.desc: Browse reviewed used wall printers for sale by region, price, status, brand, model, and printhead configuration. Buyer verification and seller introductions are handled with admin review.
